title: BEM-646 runner smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
checks=[]
checks.append({'name':'codex_runner_exists','pass':runner.exists(),'evidence':str(runner)})
checks.append({'name':'permissions_has_contents_write','pass':'  contents: write' in text,'evidence':str(runner)})
checks.append({'name':'permissions_has_actions_read','pass':'  actions: read' in text,'evidence':str(runner)})
checks.append({'name':'no_duplicate_top_level_actions_read','pass':'\nactions: read' not in text,'evidence':str(runner)})
checks.append({'name':'workflow_dispatch_present','pass':'workflow_dispatch:' in text,'evidence':str(runner)})
checks.append({'name':'python_executor_patterns_present','pass':'Run script:' in text or 'objective' in text,'evidence':str(runner)})
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'CODEX_RUNNER_POST_REPAIR_SMOKE_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'codex_runner_post_repair_smoke.v1','bem':'BEM-646','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:13 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-646 | Post-Repair Codex Runner Smoke | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:13 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke','cycle_id':'bem646-post-repair-codex-runner-smoke','source':'gpt_selftest','status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:13 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['codex_runner_write_channel_status']='restored' if status=='pass' else 'not_restored'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:13 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-646 '+status.upper()+': post-repair codex runner smoke completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Ran post-repair smoke for codex-runner.yml permissions and workflow dispatch')
"""
No issue comments.
